# Repository maintenance instructions

Rules for routine maintenance of this Awesome List.

- Make small maintenance edits only.
- Do not create new content directories.
- Do not rewrite the `README.md` structure without explicit instruction.
- Do not change the repository thesis or scope without explicit instruction.
- Do not add research notes, digests, or signal logs outside `README.md`.
- Keep support files (CI, instructions, templates, agent files) concise and current.
- After edits, run or recommend the CI checks: awesome-lint, markdown link check, and repository-health.
- Preserve the private-first positioning unless told otherwise.
